name: somtimz-plugins
description: Enterprise Architecture and RAG plugins for Claude Code

plugins.name: ea-assistant
plugins.description: End-to-end Enterprise Architecture engagement management. Supports TOGAF 10, Zachman, and ArchiMate.

plugins.name: RAG-assistant
plugins.description: Conversational RAG assistant — ingests local and SharePoint documents into a ChromaDB vector store and exposes a web UI for natural-language Q&A, document management, and pipeline control.

plugins.name: ITIL-assistant
plugins.description: ITIL v4 Change Management assistant — create, manage, and review Change Requests with CAB approval workflow.
